'''Kiras Torla''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] living during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], Torla was a member of [[Twilight Class]] at the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]. During her studies, Torla became a close friend of the GOSS staff, including the dean [[Barosa Warren]].<ref name="AIR" />

Torla graduated with honors alongside the rest of her class. However, the other eleven in Twilight Class decided to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and, as a result, gained Warren as an enemy. Torla never joined the Alliance but she was specially scared of her former friend. Thus, she disappeared from the Imperial space. Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], it was believed that Torla, by then a middle-aged scout, was somewhere in the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="AIR" />
